image.title: Operations cockpit reference visual
image.caption: A single visual anchor lets the audience inspect environment, interface density, and operational posture before reading interpretation notes.

insightSummary: Use this page when one screenshot, field photo, map, or generated visual carries the evidence. Keep the supporting text short and point to visible details.

observations.label: Primary Signal
observations.description: The visual establishes a high-density monitoring environment with strong executive-report tone.

observations.label: Audience Task
observations.description: The layout gives the image most of the canvas so stakeholders can read the asset directly.

observations.label: Traceability
observations.description: Caption and footer preserve asset provenance without turning the page into a citation block.

footerSource: Source: visual research asset, screenshot review, and analyst annotation
